NoteTitle: Household onboarding – family profile and initial risk assessment
Body: Onboarded household. Anders owns an engineering consultancy (~25 FTE); Sofie is a hospital consultant. Two children (b. 2009, 2012). Salary accounts, joint budget, realkredit on villa in Holte. Interested in long-term investing but cautious - 'we don't want surprises'. Risk appetite low-to-medium at onboarding.

NoteTitle: Pension setup and moderate portfolio launch
Body: Set up ratepension contributions for both. Started moderate portfolio (60/40 bonds/equity). Anders keen to keep equity limited - bad single-stock experience 2008. Agreed globally diversified funds only, no single names.

NoteTitle: Realkredit refinance and children's savings opened
Body: Refinanced realkredit to lower fixed rate. Opened boerneopsparing + small supplementary fund for the kids. Sofie raised interest in sustainable/green funds - flagged for follow-up, no product fit discussed yet.

NoteTitle: Advisor handover – context rebuild and risk reconfirmation
Body: First meeting after handover from Mette. Spent most of it rebuilding context - clients frustrated they had to start over and re-explain the family situation and last year's green-investment interest. History was thin; had to ask a lot. Reconfirmed low-medium risk; equity stance still conservative.

NoteTitle: Equity increase declined – ESG sleeve added
Body: Markets strong, portfolio up. Raised moving toward 50/50. Anders HESITANT, prefers defensive - 'I sleep better with bonds.' Declined the increase. Did agree to add an ESG/sustainable equity sleeve (~10%) - finally addresses Sofie's 2018 interest. Opened aktiesparekonto for each.

NoteTitle: Potential consultancy stake sale – preliminary liquidity plan
Body: Anders exploring selling a minority stake in the consultancy in next 1-2 yrs - possible liquidity event DKK 4-6m. Tentative plan: partial realkredit paydown + rest into portfolio phased (not lump). Revisit when deal firmer.

NoteTitle: Stake sale fell through – livrente question raised
Body: Liquidity event did NOT happen (deal fell through). Clients disappointed; no portfolio change. Sofie asked about livrente vs ratepension for retirement at ~62. Parked - needs pension specialist input.

NoteTitle: Third advisor handover – open items carried forward
Body: Handover from Thomas. Again significant time re-establishing context; clients noted 'this is the third advisor we've explained everything to.' Confirmed low-medium risk, ~50/50 with ESG sleeve, kids' savings ongoing, Sofie's livrente question still open. ACTION: bring pension specialist next time.

NoteTitle: Livrente started and equity drift agreed with specialist
Body: Annual review WITH pension specialist. Started a livrente alongside ratepension, modest top-up. Anders now slightly MORE open to equities after strong returns - agreed to drift to 55/45 over 12 months. ESG sleeve performing well. Fixed mortgage rate still favourable, no action.
Short note - left voicemail re annual review scheduling. No answer. Will retry.

NoteTitle: Stake sale revisited – education and private markets flagged
Body: Consultancy stake sale back on the table, more concrete (DKK ~5m, expected H1 2026). Reconfirmed 2022 plan: partial realkredit paydown + phased investment of remainder. Anders explicitly wants phasing over ~18 months, no market timing. Children now teens; shift boerneopsparing toward education timeline (eldest to uni ~2027). Sofie curious about a small private-markets/unlisted allocation - undecided, flagged for next conversation.

NoteTitle: PB upgrade onboarding – KYC only (deep-dive pending)
Body: New PB customer, upgraded from premium. Inherited proceeds from sale of family property. Onboarding mostly KYC and account setup. Friendly but time-pressured (travels a lot). Did not get to investment profile or goals - ran out of time. Reschedule for deep-dive.

NoteTitle: Idle cash follow-up – risk profile still missing
Body: Brief call. Wants 'something done with the cash sitting idle' but couldn't meet at length. Asked us to send a proposal. NOTE: no risk profile on file, no goals captured, no time horizon. Need a proper session before proposing anything.
